text:
miwi        2008-01-03 11:00:32 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    devel                Makefile 
  Added files:
    devel/p5-File-Monitor Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
  Log:
  This module provides a simple interface for monitoring
  one or more files or directories and reporting any changes
  that are made to them.
  
  Author: Andy Armstrong <andy@hexten.net>
  WWW:    http://search.cpan.org/~andya/File-Monitor/
  
  PR:             ports/119131
  Submitted by:   Masahiro Teramoto <markun at onohara.to>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.2949    +1 -0      ports/devel/Makefile
  1.1       +28 -0     ports/devel/p5-File-Monitor/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/devel/p5-File-Monitor/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +6 -0      ports/devel/p5-File-Monitor/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +9 -0      ports/devel/p5-File-Monitor/pkg-plist (new)
